vocabulary.label: Vesper Pool
vocabulary.description: A smart contract pool that accepts user deposits and automatically optimizes yield by deploying assets into DeFi strategies. Pools are identified by contract addresses and support assets such as DAI, USDC, WETH, and WBTC.

vocabulary.label: Pool Dashboard
vocabulary.description: An aggregated view of a Vesper pool including its contract address, token holdings, strategies, pool rewards, operational status, and lifecycle stage.

vocabulary.label: Yield Strategy
vocabulary.description: An automated smart contract mechanism that deploys pool assets into external DeFi protocols (e.g., Aave, Compound, MakerDAO) to generate yield returns for depositors.

vocabulary.label: Pool Rewards
vocabulary.description: VSP token rewards distributed to pool depositors based on their share of the pool. Managed by a dedicated rewards contract address.

vocabulary.label: Pool Status
vocabulary.description: The operational state of a Vesper pool. Can be 'operative' (actively accepting deposits and generating yield) or 'paused' (temporarily halted for maintenance or risk reasons).

vocabulary.label: Pool Stage
vocabulary.description: The lifecycle stage of a Vesper pool: 'alpha' (early testing), 'beta' (limited availability), 'prod' (fully production-ready), or 'retired' (no longer active).

vocabulary.label: Annual Percentage Yield
vocabulary.description: The effective annualized return on a pool deposit, compounding interest earned. Calculated over the past 24 hours for Vesper loan rate data.

vocabulary.label: Annual Percentage Rate
vocabulary.description: The annualized interest rate for a pool excluding compounding effects. Calculated over the past 24 hours for Vesper loan rate data.

vocabulary.label: Earning Rates
vocabulary.description: Historical APY figures for a pool over 1-day, 2-day, 7-day, and 30-day windows, enabling trend analysis of pool performance.

vocabulary.label: Risk Level
vocabulary.description: An integer score from 1 (lowest risk) to 5 (highest risk) indicating the relative risk profile of a Vesper pool based on underlying protocol exposure and strategy complexity.

vocabulary.label: Token Value
vocabulary.description: The current value in underlying asset units of a single Vesper pool token. Increases over time as the pool accrues yield.

vocabulary.label: Total Supply
vocabulary.description: The total number of Vesper pool tokens currently in circulation, represented as a string to preserve full 256-bit integer precision from the smart contract.

vocabulary.label: Interest Fee
vocabulary.description: The performance fee percentage charged on yield generated by a pool. Deducted from earned interest before distribution to depositors.

vocabulary.label: Withdrawal Fee
vocabulary.description: The fee percentage charged when a user withdraws funds from a pool. Often set to 0% for established pools.

vocabulary.label: Lock Period
vocabulary.description: The minimum number of seconds that deposited tokens must remain in the pool before withdrawal is permitted. 0 means instant withdrawal is available.

vocabulary.label: Data Point
vocabulary.description: A historical on-chain snapshot for a specific Vesper pool capturing block number, timestamp, accrued interest, pool supply, and total asset value.

vocabulary.label: Block Number
vocabulary.description: The Ethereum (or EVM-compatible chain) block number at which a snapshot was taken. Used to anchor historical data to a specific point in chain history.

vocabulary.label: Value Locked
vocabulary.description: The total amount of underlying assets deposited and locked within a Vesper pool at a given point in time, expressed in the pool's native asset units.

vocabulary.label: Values Locked (TVL snapshot)
vocabulary.description: A historical snapshot of total value locked across all Vesper pools, keyed by pool contract address and mapped to a string-encoded balance.

vocabulary.label: VSP Token
vocabulary.description: The Vesper Finance governance and reward token. Distributed to pool depositors as incentives and used for protocol governance voting.

vocabulary.label: VSP Statistics
vocabulary.description: Current market and distribution statistics for the VSP token including price, supply, market cap, and 30-day distribution totals.

vocabulary.label: Circulating Supply
vocabulary.description: The number of VSP tokens currently in active circulation on the market, excluding locked or reserved tokens.

vocabulary.label: Market Capitalization
vocabulary.description: The total market value of all circulating VSP tokens, calculated as price multiplied by circulating supply.

vocabulary.label: 30-Day Distribution
vocabulary.description: The total amount of VSP tokens distributed as pool rewards over the past 30 days.

vocabulary.label: Holder Count
vocabulary.description: The number of unique wallet addresses that currently hold tokens from a given Vesper pool.

vocabulary.label: MakerDAO Vault
vocabulary.description: A collateralized debt position (CDP) vault on the MakerDAO protocol used by certain Vesper strategies to generate DAI from collateral assets.

vocabulary.label: Dashboard Endpoint
vocabulary.description: The /dashboard API endpoint returning aggregated pool metadata for all active Vesper pools.

vocabulary.label: Loan Rates Endpoint
vocabulary.description: The /loan-rates API endpoint returning 24-hour APY and APR figures for all Vesper pools.
